# MiyTube

> MiyTube is a free video platform where creators upload, watch, and share videos across sports, music, news, education, entertainment, science & tech, and more.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Trending videos, shorts, and recommendations.
- [Videos](/videos): Browse the full video library.
- [Shorts](/shorts): Short-form vertical videos.
- [Trending](/trending): What's popular right now.
- [Long Videos](/long-videos): Long-form content (10+ min).
- [Music](/music): Music videos and audio across genres.
- [Sports](/sports): Sports highlights and full match content.
- [Educational](/educational): Learning videos and tutorials.
- [News](/news): Breaking news and current events.
- [Talk at Cha](/talk-at-cha): Community discussion boards.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles, guides, and creator stories.
- [Upload](/upload): Upload your own videos and music.
- [Advertising](/advertising): Run ads on MiyTube.
- [Monetization](/monetization): Creator partner program.
- [About](/about): About MiyTube.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact and support.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Copyright](/copyright): Copyright and DMCA policy.
